description_long: This is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a short, dark metallic barrel and a wooden pistol grip. The barrels are thick and robust, with a small bead sight on top for aiming. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a double-trigger mechanism, while the wooden grip is ergonomically shaped for one-handed use. A single red shotgun shell is shown alongside the weapon, indicating its ammunition type. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible stock and a focus on portability and ease of handling. The finish of the metal parts is smooth and slightly glossy, contrasting with the matte, textured wood of the grip.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barreled shotgun with a short, dark metal barrel and a wooden pistol grip. It features a rounded trigger guard and a single red shotgun shell nearby.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden pistol grip, double barrels, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the two parallel barrels and the red shotgun shell placed beside the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the shotgun's profile, the wooden grip, and the shell positioned beneath the barrels.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden grip and the open ends of the double barrels, with the shell visible to the left.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
